sourceMovie.title: Hotel Transylvania
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Hotel Transylvania (2012) stuck because it commits to its animation premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Genndy Tartakovsky's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The animation and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Lego Movie
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Hotel Transylvania clicked for you, The Lego Movie (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Hotel Transylvania?
faq.answer: Try The Lego Movie, Hotel Transylvania 2, Hotel Transylvania 3: Summer Vacation—each shares DNA with Hotel Transylvania while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Hotel Transylvania?
faq.answer: Hotel Transylvania (2012) is best described as Animation, Comedy, Family, Fantasy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Hotel Transylvania part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Hotel Transylvania Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
